title: MDU Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: MDU Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: MDU Date Sheet 2026 released for UG Programs and B.Ed 2nd Year exams May/June 2026. Check revised and modified exam schedule PDF at mdu.ac.in.

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University has officially released the MDU Date Sheet 2026 with modifications and inclusions for UG Programs Examinations May 2026. The revised schedule for B.Ed 2nd year (Regular & Re-appear) exams is also available for May/June 2026 session on the official website mdu.ac.in.

Students can download the official date sheet PDF and check their exam schedule. It is advised to verify all details carefully and contact the university examination branch in case of any discrepancy.
Official Download Link: MDU Date Sheet 2026 Portal

MDU Date Sheet 2026 has been updated with revisions for undergraduate courses and B.Ed programs. This includes notifications for modifications in the datesheet of UG exams and revised schedule for B.Ed 2nd year students.

The MDU Date Sheet 2026 includes detailed schedules for undergraduate programs and B.Ed 2nd year courses. Students can check the revised examination dates for various subjects under Regular and Re-appear categories for the May/June 2026 session.

sections.heading: How to Download MDU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the MDU Date Sheet 2026 directly from the official university portal. Follow these easy steps to access and save your exam schedule.

items: Visit the official MDU website at mdu.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examination or Date Sheet section.
Look for the notification regarding UG Programs or B.Ed revised date sheet.
Click on the relevant PDF link to view the schedule.
Download the file and take a printout for daily reference.

content.text: Students should check the official date sheet carefully and keep a copy for their exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MDU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The MDU Date Sheet 2026 provides complete information about the upcoming examinations. Students must carefully review all details mentioned in the revised notification.
